qtype: decimal multiplication and division based on given product

tex:
%(a)

Kat has a method for finding the difference between two square numbers, $\,a^2 - b^2\,$.
\newline
 \\
Her method is

(the sum of $\,a\,$ and $\,b\,$) $\,\times\,$ (the difference between $\,a\,$ and $\,b\,$).
\newline
  She shows her method for $\,17^2 - 13^2\,$.
\newline

  \begin{align*
    &17^2 - 13^2 \\
    &= (17 + 13) \times (17 - 13) \\
    &= 30 \times 4 \\
    &= 120\\
   \end{align*}
  
 }

Work out $\,29^2 - 21^2\,$ using Kat's method.
\newline

(b)

In this part, all lengths are in centimetres.
\newline

The diagram shows a prism.
\newline

Work out the volume of the prism.
\newline
